com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXCenterStripResult


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXCenterStripResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - for specifying the parant wire of center of a signal with center stripped splices

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addParentWire(java.util.Set<IXWire> replacedWires)
      Add Parent Wire for the current harness level - Adds a definition of a parent wire to follow the route choosen from the set of wires handed into the match method of IXCenterStripSpliceConstraint.
      java.util.List<java.util.Set<IXWire>> getParentWires()
      Get Parent Wires -

    • Method Detail

      • addParentWire

        void addParentWire(java.util.Set<IXWire> replacedWires)
        Add Parent Wire for the current harness level - Adds a definition of a parent wire to follow the route choosen from the set of wires handed into the match method of IXCenterStripSpliceConstraint. The parent wire will replace the wires of this set. Validation: The wires in the set may only be used once in this result object. Each set of wires must represent a single continuous path of the owning signal.
        Parameters:
        replacedWires - - a Set of wires choosen from the list handed in to the match method of IXCenterStripSpliceConstraint

      • getParentWires

        java.util.List<java.util.Set<IXWire>> getParentWires()
        Get Parent Wires -
        Returns:
        - a list of sets of wires. Each set in the list represents a valid parent wire to be created to replace the wires of the set. Other wires remaining on splices of the signal will be child wires of center stripped splices.
